publishedAbstract: This document is for users of [Red Hat OpenShift Data Foundation](https://www.redhat.com/en/technologies/cloud-computing/openshift-data-foundation), [Red Hat Ceph Storage](https://www.redhat.com/en/technologies/storage/ceph) or [Red Hat Gluster](https://www.redhat.com/en/technologies/storage/gluster). It will address commonly asked questions about the October, 2022 announcement regarding the strategic enhancements to the Red Hat and IBM Storage offerings.
